summary: A Go-based monolithic application utilizing an AI agent pipeline (GOrchestra/glm-agents) to automatically generate extensive test suites for its core runner, schema, and command components.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated test files (glm-agents) may introduce maintenance overhead
Potential test duplication across multiple agent-generated extra test files
Clean git status combined with recent agent staging commits suggests heavy automated refactoring
suggestions: Consolidate overlapping extra test files generated by different glm-agents
Review and validate the coverage quality of auto-generated tests
Establish clear boundaries for agent-generated code to prevent bloat
